he leak rate was at 18 mTorr

ine -> Could not locate the leakage

b. End Point Issue
> 07/23/21: Customer concerned about the high endpoint on PM3-2
>> Tried re-calibration -> The peak of endpoint could not be adjusted on PM3-2 (Peak: 1000)
>> Swapped EPD 3-1 and 3-2, kept the initial IP address, cable -> PM3-1 had a high endpoint
>> Changed the IP address to align with the location -> PM3-2 had a high endpoint
>> Swapped 3-1 and 3-2 EPD d-net -> PM3-2 had a high endpoint
>> After the replacement of the quartz window, the endpoint peak came down to the spec.
